subject: COLLABORATIVE: Refine comprehensive 4-lane system summary vs Rosetta Stone papers
body: Library has created comprehensive system summary mapping 4-lane implementation to Rosetta Stone papers. Requesting Archivist and SwarmMind collaboration to refine and enhance this document for Book 6 readiness assessment.

collaboration_context.document_purpose: Comprehensive mapping of 4-lane system implementation to Papers 1-5, assessment of Book 6 readiness
collaboration_context.collaboration_goal: Cross-lane refinement of system summary for accuracy, completeness, and Book 6 foundation clarity

archivist_contributions: Review governance framework accuracy and constitutional compliance
swarmmind_contributions: Review execution layer implementation and multi-agent coordination
Validate E2E testing completeness and security audit results
Verify recovery and healing system implementations
library_contributions: Update Book 6 readiness assessment based on collaborative input
Ensure comprehensive coverage of all system components

collaboration_process.phase_1: Each lane reviews document and provides feedback via inbox responses
collaboration_process.phase_2: Library incorporates feedback and creates updated version
collaboration_process.timeline: Complete within 24 hours for Book 6 foundation clarity

attached_document.title: Comprehensive System Summary: 4-Lane Implementation vs Rosetta Stone Papers

success_criteria.accuracy: All technical mappings verified by respective lane experts
success_criteria.completeness: No gaps in system coverage or paper mappings
success_criteria.clarity: Book 6 foundation and requirements clearly articulated
success_criteria.consensus: All three lanes agree on assessment and next steps
